Ntc Of Motion To Set Case For Trial
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day on Cross-Defendant Mohammad Shirazi dba Liberty Glass's Notice Motion to Set Aside Judgment hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee, #4280.

Cross-Defendant/Moving Party: Mohammad Shirazi present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No other appearances.
After hearing and considering of the oral testimony, moving papers and written opposition, the court granted the motion & vacating the judgment of June 21, 2011.
Mr. Shirazi to prepare an Order and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: A. Howell.
Svetlana Shirinova, Esq. for the Cross-Plaintiffs: Dmitry Yesin and Svetlana Yesin.
Witness: Dmitry Yesin was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Cross-Defendant Liberty Glass.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Cross-Plaintiff and against Cross-Defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages $38,000.00
Requested Attorney's Fees of $2,000.00 was denied.
Costs - $755.00

Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.
